task: Flagship expert task: High-Speed Rail Pantograph Arcing Root-Cause and Speed Restriction Plan. Reality context: a high-speed rail operator sees pantograph arcing on one section after catenary maintenance. Embedded packet: sections: S1 speed_kmh=280 contact_force_N=82 stagger_mm=190 arc_count=3, S2 speed=300 force=61 stagger=260 arcs=17, S3 speed=260 force=74 stagger=210 arcs=5; limits contact_force 70-90N, stagger<=230mm, arc_count<=6 per pass; actions reduce_speed_40kmh lowers arcs 45%, adjust_tension cost=55000 reduces_stagger 40mm, pantograph_inspect cost=12000. Rules and constraints: Identify root-cause controls, test speed/tension actions, and recommend operating restriction. Required work: deliver pantograph_arcing_review.xlsx + speed_restriction_memo.md. The deliverables must include formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around the controlling thresholds, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels. Use only the embedded packet. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
